author.description: Rule set author name or handle.

creation-date.description: Creation date of the rule set metadata record.

cve-id.description: CVE identifier(s) associated with the rule set.

editor.description: Name of the user who last edited or maintains the rule set.

format.description: Rule set format (for example YARA, NSE, Sigma).

github-path.description: Path or URL pointing to the rule set source in GitHub.

is-favorited.description: Indicates whether the rule set is marked as favorited.

last-modif.description: Last modification date of the rule set metadata record.

license.description: License applied to the rule set.

original-uuid.description: Original UUID of the rule set in its source system.

source.description: Source platform or provider of the rule set metadata.

title.description: Human-readable title of the rule set.

to-string.description: Serialized string representation of the rule set metadata.

user-id.description: Identifier of the user associated with the rule set metadata.

uuid.description: UUID of the rule set metadata record.

version.description: Version identifier of the rule set.

vote-down.description: Number of downvotes for the rule set.

vote-up.description: Number of upvotes for the rule set.

description: Rule set metadata object meant to be linked to rule content objects such as YARA, NSE, Sigma or similar templates.
name: ruleset-metadata
